title: Marbella Private Catamaran Hire for a Birthday: Costs and Tips 2026
html:
Planning a birthday celebration in Marbella? Hiring a private catamaran on the Mediterranean Sea offers a memorable way to mark the occasion, with departures from Puerto Banús and prices typically starting around EUR 2,500 for a half-day charter. BoatHire24 connects you with verified boat owners for a seamless booking experience.

How much does it cost to hire a private catamaran for a birthday in Marbella?

Half-day private catamaran hire in Marbella starts at around EUR 2,500, with full-day charters averaging EUR 4,000 to EUR 6,000. Prices vary by boat size, crew, and extras like catering. For a bespoke experience, you can browse boats for your dates on BoatHire24. You can browse boats for your dates in a few minutes.

Where to set off in Marbella

Marbella’s coastline offers several excellent departure points for private catamaran hire. The most famous is Puerto Banús, a glamorous marina lined with luxury shops and restaurants. Other options include Puerto Deportivo de Marbella, the main harbour near the old town, and Cabopino Marina, a smaller, quieter port east of Marbella. One option worth a look is the Princess F70 for hire.

From these marinas, popular cruising grounds include the bay of Marbella, the coast towards Calahonda, and the waters off Gibraltar, about 35 nautical miles south. Many charters also visit the island of Isla de las Palomas or drop anchor near the Punta de la Mona headland. You can also see more at check availability.

Which boat to rent for a birthday celebration

  1. Catamaran, perfect for parties with stable deck space; up to 12 guests; from EUR 3,000 half-day.
  2. Motor yacht, faster and more luxurious; up to 10 guests; from EUR 2,800 half-day; consider the Princess F70 for hire.
  3. Sailing yacht, a relaxed, eco-friendly option; up to 8 guests; from EUR 2,200 half-day.
  4. RIB or speedboat, great for thrill-seekers; up to 6 guests; from EUR 1,500 half-day.
  5. Luxury gulet, a traditional wooden vessel; up to 16 guests; from EUR 4,500 full-day.

Cost breakdown for boat hire in Marbella

  • Shared group tour: from EUR 80 per person for a 3-hour sailing trip.
  • Small motorboat half-day (up to 6 guests): EUR 500, EUR 1,000.
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 12 guests): EUR 4,000, EUR 6,000.
  • Private crewed yacht (up to 16 guests, full-day): EUR 5,000, EUR 8,000.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella?

No licence is needed for a skippered charter; the captain holds all required qualifications. For bareboat hire (self-drive), a Spanish or internationally recognised licence is required. The operator confirms exact requirements before you book. For more details, refer to the booking FAQ. To see how booking works, visit the booking FAQ.

Local tip: book your catamaran for early September to avoid peak crowds in August while still enjoying warm Mediterranean weather and the light Levante wind.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 2,500, EUR 8,000 for private charters
  • Peak months: June, July, August, September
  • Trip length: half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours)
  • Capacity: up to 12 guests on catamarans, up to 16 on yachts
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I bring my own food and drink on a catamaran charter?

Yes, many private charters allow you to bring your own catering, though some operators offer premium packages including champagne and canapés.

What is the cancellation policy for birthday charters?

It varies by listing, but many offer free cancellation up to 7 days before departure; always check the terms before booking.

Is there a minimum age for children on board?

Children of all ages are welcome, but life jackets must be worn at all times and some operators may require a minimum age for safety reasons.

How far in advance should I book for a birthday in August?

Book at least 4 to 6 weeks ahead for August, as private catamarans in Marbella sell out quickly during high season.
